reviews.review_title: Pretty good if you want a free gory game
reviews.review_description: Pretty good if you want a free gory game I used to hardly play this but I went back and played for 3 hours straight just killing.Better than beyond sandbox so far but beyond might take over.Please do a update for a misson there can be a cargo ship and you have to get files and evidence and civilians.Otherwise 5 stars

Listen, this is a grest game, but make the npc's have blood dripping down when you shoot them, like Blade and Sorcery (yes, I know Blade and Sorcery doesn't have guns in the main game, only with mods). Also, add speechlines to the npc's, and make them say something like, "No, no, no, please don't shoot!", or, "Ok, ok, I surrender!".

reviews.review_title: I LOVE THIS GAME SO MUCH!

And i think this game is underrated

I do indeed believe this has potential, I have a few suggestions that might work well for the game, of example, 1: revamped AI, not every NPC should know where you are when you kill one NPC, 2: in sandbox there’s a thing you could turn on to where the NPCs don’t always know where you are, 3: NPC dialogue that differs from who it is, because they’re extremely quiet and it doesn’t make sense, these are only suggestions to help grow the game, not to damage the reputation, thank you.

reviews.review_title: Cannot select bot weapons in menu
reviews.review_description: So the game is great and fun and all, but you buy weapons and unlock weapons but when you pull that little pistol out to select which gun you want, there’s no way to change the cursor. There’s no way to select. I’ve tried everything. The game is broken and clearly they’re not fixing it so don’t spend any money on this BS game. ￼

reviews.review_title: Not a cash grab gorilla tag clone
reviews.review_description: finally a free to play game with actual heart and not a cash grab gorilla tag clone for what it is this game is pretty good the shooting feels good although i am running into a problem with the npc's legs the legs are completely broken on the npc's the dev could have easily charged maybe $10 for this game what is the not to this game is pretty great for people who just want a fun shooting game although the graphics are pretty bad

reviews.review_title: A very great game for free
reviews.review_description: The weapons and maps are very detailed and enemies very strong pathway to find the player and movement is great especially with the slow motion ability but maybe add more gore and flesh than just blood and bruises add a multiplayer system if possible with working voice chat it would be very fun to have a whole lobby bring in a gang and having wars with NPC’s and other players

so um i just wanted to say how much i actually love the game and a couple of good ideas for weapons would be maybe some brass knuckles  maybe a mace a double sided sword maybe a tonto bazooka and maybe you'd add some effects like bone snapping blood being left on the weapon after like a stab or something bullet holes but also be nice instead of just those bullet hole textures this is all just a recommendation it's your game you do you you don't have to do any of these thank you for your time

reviews.review_title: great game, but can improve a lot
reviews.review_description: this was one of my first vr games, one of my first impressions. this games concept is cool, and has decent variety. but the game lacks polished models, ragdolls, and the gore feels way too unrealistic. and hand to hand combat should be way harder. overall, great concept and game, but the graphics and mechanics could be worked on.
One of the best game i played but the only thing is that you should add cars so you can drive around and a city map with a little more gore i messaged you on tick tock I play around 5-6 hours a day

It’s a great time, my only complaint (aside from the lacking melee system) is the contracts system. More specifically, there aren’t very many contracts to do, so if you play that gamemode often (like I do) you quickly end up just doing the same things over and over.

My only request would be to add new maps, or preferably, add more contract missions for more variety during runs.

Awesome game! really love the sandbox mode and the other two. I can definitely tell though that the game is still in it's first stages. But that doesn't matter because the game is perfect. There are bugs and ghlitchs that i found however. One of the ghlitchs was that i got all the newly added guns and handweapons and for some reason don't actually have them in my inventory. I know there are going to be a few bugs and ghlitchs here and there. So keep up the great work and i will wait for all these bugs to get fixed in the future. Love your game, Love the maps, and i love your creatation. Never be let down by others who put a one star because deleting everything would ruin our hearts who love this handmade creatation. Thank you.

reviews.review_title: l Why it could potentially skyrocket.
reviews.review_description: Gang Warfare is a very awesome game because it delivers intense, fast-paced action that makes every match feel exciting and unpredictable, especially with its competitive combat, progression system, and the thrill of earning currency and upgrades through skill and strategy. The variety of weapons, maps, and playstyles keeps players coming back, while the risk-reward feeling of fights makes wins feel genuinely satisfying. However, the game could be even better with improved balancing between weapons and upgrades, clearer tutorials for new players, fewer bugs and exploit fixes, and more frequent content updates such as new maps, modes, or customization options. Adding better anti-cheat systems and quality-of-life features like smoother matchmaking or clearer UI would also greatly improve the overall experience and help Gang Warfare reach its full potential as a top-tier competitive game.
This game is so fun i wish it had multiplayer tho but the game has great gameplay and is very fun.
Go to play ts game its fun as frick!

Overall I think the concept of the game is really attention grabbing and fun and the mechanics of the game are cool and all, but it could really use an overhaul on the ai and the ragdoll physics. Devs, it would really grab peoples attention if you would add multiplayer. Because it is called “gang” warfare, so you would need to start off with co-op and then progress to pvp. Once again this game still has high potential, you just need to execute it well. 👌
